title: Dhammapada, Chapter 3: The Mind
description: Chapter 3 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 3 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: As a fletcher makes straight his arrow, the wise person makes straight the trembling, unsteady mind, which is difficult to guard and difficult to hold back.
